sample.title: Dogtooth
sample.plot: Kept on a short leash through a volatile mixture of indoctrination, misinformation and fear, three grown-up siblings--two sisters and one brother--find themselves confined to their lavish, isolated villa. As a result, holed up in their beautiful, high-walled prison, the siblings rely on their cold, manipulative parents to learn about the ways of the world, taking reality-defying lessons from instructional cassette tapes. And, as the cruel patriarch and his frigid wife deliberately keep their unsuspecting, submissive children in the dark, freedom is nothing but a word. Then, a bad influence in the shape of security guard Christina enters the equation, and suddenly, sweet, baffling temptation threatens years of meticulous mind-programming. Is the grass greener on the other side of the fence? With this in mind, how can an ordinary dogtooth stand in the way of happiness?

sample.title: Winnie-the-Pooh: Blood and Honey
sample.plot: After Christopher Robin abandons them for college, Pooh and Piglet embark on a bloody rampage as they search for a new source of food.

sample.title: The Twin
sample.plot: A mother has to confront the unbearable truth about her surviving twin son.

sample.title: Cats
sample.plot: A tribe of cats called the Jellicles must decide yearly which one will ascend to the Heaviside Layer and come back to a new Jellicle life.

sample.title: The Wolf Man
sample.plot: Upon the death of his brother, Larry Talbot returns from America to his ancestral home in Wales. He visits a gypsy camp with village girl Jenny Williams, who is attacked by Bela, a gypsy who has turned into a werewolf. Larry kills the werewolf but is bitten during the fight. Bela's mother tells him that this will cause him to become a werewolf at each full moon. Larry confesses his plight to his unbelieving father, Sir John, who then joins the villagers in a hunt for the wolf. Transformed by the full moon, Larry heads for the forest and a fateful meeting with both Sir John and Gwen Conliffe.

sample.title: Limo
sample.plot: In a dystopian world, a limousine driver named Arthur transports various passengers around the centre of Riga. His every move is monitored by the limousine's artificial intelligence, MO. Arthur and MO's relationship is seemingly f...

sample.title: Blue Story
sample.plot: Blue Story is a tragic tale of a friendship between Timmy and Marco, two young boys from opposing postcodes. Timmy, a shy, smart, naive and timid young boy from Deptford, goes to school in Peckham where he strikes up a friendship with Marco, a charismatic, streetwise kid from the local area. Although from warring postcodes, the two quickly form a firm friendship until it is tested and they wind up on rival sides of a street war. Blue Story depicts elements of Rapman's own personal experiences and aspects of his childhood.

sample.title: Goodbye Berlin
sample.plot: With the birthday party of the most beautiful girl in the class coming in less than three weeks, the diffident fourteen-year-old teenager, Maik, has a lot on his mind. To further complicate matters, Maik's alcohol-dependent tennis enthusiast mother is in and out of the beauty farm--aka the rehab facility--and his real estate developer father is utterly indifferent. Under those circumstances, the unexpected arrival of the exciting new classmate, Tschick, will create quite a stir, when the class' rejects boldly decide to hit the road in an old "borrowed" light-blue Lada, going from uncool to cool in a split second. Little by little--as Tschick and Maik set off on an unforgettable joyride in East Germany's great outdoors--they will find out the meaning of friendship, and the thrill of the first love. This is going to be, hands down, the best summer ever.

sample.title: The Bouncer
sample.plot: The hero independently raises his little daughter and works as a security guard in a nightclub. Work is simple, enough to live. At night, he is on duty, and during the day he can communicate with the girl, because he loves her so much. Once in a bar, a terrible fight takes place, the hero has to intervene, but the consequences were sad. As a result, he finds himself in a police station, and then he is sentenced to prison.

sample.title: The Wave
sample.plot: Based on the fact that mountain pass Åkneset, located in the Geiranger fjord in Norway, will one day collapse and create a violent tsunami of over 80 meters that will crush everything in its path before it hits land in Greenland. A geologist gets caught in the middle of it and a race against time begins.

sample.title: The Spy Who Came in from the Cold
sample.plot: Alec Leamas (Richard Burton), a British spy, is sent to East Germany, supposedly to defect, but in fact to sow disinformation. As more plot turns appear, Leamas becomes more convinced that his own people see him as just a cog. His struggle back from dehumanization becomes the final focus of the story.

sample.title: The Summer with Carmen
sample.plot: While having a day-long swim at Athens' queer beach, best friends Demos and Nikitas recall the events of a recent summer in the prospect of turning them into a screenplay for Nikitas' feature debut.

sample.title: Squared Love Everlasting
sample.plot: In this third "Squared Love" film, Monika and Enzo's whirlwind romance heads toward a fairy-tale ending until a bombshell revelation changes everything.

sample.title: Terminal
sample.plot: In the dark heart of a sprawling, anonymous city, TERMINAL follows the twisting tales of two assassins carrying out a sinister mission, a teacher battling a fatal illness, an enigmatic janitor, and a curious waitress leading a dangerous double life. Murderous consequences unravel in the dead of night as their lives all intertwine at the hands of a mysterious criminal mastermind hell-bent on revenge.

sample.title: The Making of the Secret Scripture
sample.plot: N/A

sample.title: Silent Night
sample.plot: Nell, Simon and their son Art host a yearly Christmas dinner at their country estate for their former school friends and their spouses. It is gradually revealed that there is an imminent environmental catastrophe and that this dinner will be their last night alive.

sample.title: Inside
sample.plot: Four months before Christmas, Sarah and Matthieu Scarangelo were in a car crash, of which Sarah and her unborn baby were the only survivors. On Christmas Eve, Sarah stays home alone, where she grieves her husband and prepares to go to the hospital the next morning for the delivery. As night falls, a woman knocks on Sarah's door asking to use the phone. When she refuses, the woman reveals that she knows Sarah and tries to force her way in. Sarah calls the police; they inspect the home and determine the woman has left, but promise to keep watch over Sarah through the night. The woman returns and tries to take Sarah's unborn child, but Sarah locks herself in the bathroom. The strange woman torments Sarah through the night and kills all who try help her.

sample.title: The Girl in the Fog
sample.plot: On her way to church in the hazy alpine village of Avechot, the quiet 15-year-old, Anna Lou, daughter of a religious couple, vanishes into thin air, never to return home. To aid in the investigation of this puzzling case is summoned the fastidious Detective Vogel with the questionable methods; however, amidst a full-scale media storm and half-baked leads, no one is above suspicion, villagers and newcomers alike. But is Anna Lou's troubling disappearance a case of an adolescent tantrum only days before Christmas, or is there a wolf in sheep's clothing, hiding in the otherwise peaceful community?

sample.title: Stick Man
sample.plot: Stick Man, an animated twig, lives with his Stick Lady Love and their children in the family tree. Out one day for a jog he meets a little boy who throws him for his dog to fetch, some children who play Pooh-sticks with him and a swan who uses him to build a nest before being washed out to sea and onto a beach far from home. After several other humiliating encounters throughout the year he has an unexpected saviour in the form of Santa Claus who helps him to get home for Christmas with his family.

sample.title: Department Q: A Conspiracy of Faith
sample.plot: An old note is found in a bottle in Jutland which has traveled very long across the ocean a long time ago. The note is hard to decipher, but when the Danish investigator from Section Q receives it, the odd personalities within the section find a new angle on it and try to unveil yet another old and diabolic case even though the lead is cold.

sample.title: Below Zero
sample.plot: On a lonely road, a prison transport is brutally assaulted. Martin, the policeman who was driving, survives and fortifies his position while the con men search for a way to finish him.

sample.title: Final Cut
sample.plot: Things go badly for a small film crew shooting a low budget zombie movie when they are attacked by real zombies.

sample.title: Casino Royale
sample.plot: After the death of M, Sir James Bond is called back out of retirement to stop SMERSH. In order to trick SMERSH and Le Chiffre, Bond thinks up the ultimate plan. That every agent will be named James Bond. One of the Bonds, whose real name is Evelyn Tremble is sent to take on Le Chiffre in a game of baccarat, but all the Bonds get more than they can handle.

sample.title: Last Year at Marienbad
sample.plot: At a weekend gathering, a man tries to convince a woman that they had met there and spent some time together the previous year. The woman has no recollection whatsoever of having met this man and is convinced that he is just making all of this up. The more the man talks about their activities the previous year however, the more convincing he becomes. The question remains however - did they meet previously or not?

sample.title: Cannibal
sample.plot: Carlos is the most prestigious tailor in Granada, but he's also a murderer in the shadows. He feels no remorse, no guilt, until Nina appears in his life and love awakens.

sample.title: Delicatessen
sample.plot: Centered on a post-apocalyptic society where food is scarce and used as currency. In an apartment building with a delicatessen on the ground floor. The owner of the eatery also owns the apartment building and is in need of a new maintenance man since the prior one "mysteriously" disappeared. A former clown applies for the job and the butcher's intent is to have him work for as little as possible. The clown and butcher's daughter fall in love and she tries to foil her father's plans by contacting the "troglodytes", a grain eating sub-group of society who live entirely underground.

sample.title: Return of Punch and Judy
sample.plot: N/A

sample.title: A Long Way Down
sample.plot: On New Year's Eve in London, four strangers find themselves on the roof of a building known for suicides. Martin is a famous talk show host just out of jail, Maureen is a lonely single mother, Jess is young, reckless and heartbroken, and JJ is an American realizing the failures in his life. Through mutual pain and humour, this unlikely group take the long way down and figure out what will keep them alive until Valentine's Day, one step at a time.

sample.title: Money Heist: The Phenomenon
sample.plot: A documentary on why and how "Money Heist" sparked a wave of enthusiasm around the world for a lovable group of thieves and their professor.

sample.title: Turn Me On, Dammit!
sample.plot: A 15-year-old Norwegian teen (Helene Bergsholm) is eager to explore her budding sexuality, but her encounter with the school heartthrob makes her a social outcast.

sample.title: Arthur Christmas
sample.plot: This movie reveals the incredible, never-before seen answer to every child's question: "So how does Santa deliver all those presents in one night?" The answer: Santa's (Jim Broadbent's) exhilarating, ultra-high-tech operation hidden beneath the North Pole. But at the center of this movie is a story about a family in a state of comic dysfunction and an unlikely hero, Arthur (James McAvoy), with an urgent mission that must be completed before Christmas morning dawns.

sample.title: Black Crab
sample.plot: Set in a post-apocalyptic world, this Swedish action thriller follows six soldiers sent on a covert mission to transport a mysterious package across a frozen archipelago without knowing what dangers lie ahead or who - if anyone - they can trust.

sample.title: The Enchanted Enigma
sample.plot: "The Enchanted Enigma" is a horror-filled journey through a dark and mysterious history, exploring the fear and terror that lies within the unknown. The film follows a group of explorers as they delve into the past to uncover the ...

sample.title: Men Vs Women
sample.plot: The love lives of the friends Walter, Diego, Renato, Marcello and Piero.

sample.title: Breaking Point
sample.plot: Follows Mathieu, a loyal husband who leads a tranquil life with his wife, as he covers his friend Vincent affairs. One day, as Mathieu tries to smooth things over with Vincent's latest mistress, he unexpectedly falls in love with ...

sample.title: Little Nicholas' Treasure
sample.plot: What Nicholas (9) loves most is playing with his gang of middle school pals, The Invincibles. Adorable, yet mischievous, they have all sorts of adventures together and life could not be funnier. So when his dad gets promoted and announces that the family is relocating to the South of France, his world falls apart. Little Nicholas cannot live without his friends. But the pack has a plan to prevent this terrible relocation: a treasure hunt.

sample.title: The Players
sample.plot: A series of short films set around the theme of infidelity.

sample.title: Take Down
sample.plot: A drug deal goes south when Erica Wilson, a drug lord, comes to deliver the drugs to Leo Harrington.

sample.title: Shaun the Sheep: The Flight Before Christmas
sample.plot: Shaun's seasonal excitement turns to dismay when a farmhouse raid to get bigger stockings for the Flock inadvertently leads to Timmy going missing. Can Shaun get Timmy back before he becomes someone else's present?

sample.title: Kick the Cock
sample.plot: Kick the Cock is an old Dutch saying, meaning Peek in the Kitchen.

sample.title: The Bystanders Path
sample.plot: It explicitly unfolds about the life struggle of unrecognized gem talented author and creative director with an immigrant background Yared who is stranded unreasonably in Finland for nothing. Yared, who did more than enough effort...

sample.title: Xtreme
sample.plot: Two years after the murder of his son and father, a retired hitman sets in motion a carefully crafted revenge plan against the killer: his own brother.

sample.title: Walking on Sunshine
sample.plot: Set to the music of popular hit songs from the 1980s. A beautiful coastal village, present day Italy. After a whirlwind romance, Maddie is preparing to marry gorgeous Italian Raf, and has invited her sister Taylor to the wedding. Unbeknownst to Maddie, however, Raf is Taylor's ex-holiday flame, and the love of her life... By: Vertigo Films

sample.title: The Little Prince
sample.plot: From Mark Osborne comes the first-ever animated feature film adaptation of Antoine de Saint-Exupéry's iconic masterpiece, The Little Prince. At the heart of it all is The Little Girl, who's being prepared by her mother for the very grown-up world in which they live - only to be interrupted by her eccentric, kind-hearted neighbor, The Aviator. The Aviator introduces his new friend to an extraordinary world where anything is possible. A world that he himself was initiated into long ago by The Little Prince. It's here that The Little Girl's magical and emotional journey into her own imagination - and into the universe of The Little Prince - begins. And it's where The Little Girl rediscovers her childhood and learns that ultimately, it's human connections that matter most, and that what's truly essential can only be seen with the heart.

sample.title: The Hard Way
sample.plot: After learning his brother died on a mission in Romania, a former soldier teams up with two allies to hunt down a mysterious enemy and exact revenge.

sample.title: The Vanishing
sample.plot: Rex and Saskia are on holiday, a young couple in love. They stop at a busy service station and Saskia disappears. Rex dedicates the next three years trying to find her. Then he receives some postcards from her abductor, who promises to reveal what has happened to Saskia. The abductor, Raymond Lemorne, is a chilling character to whom Rex is drawn by his intense desire to learn the truth behind his lovers disappearance. The truth is more sinister than he dared imagine.

sample.title: La Jetée
sample.plot: Time travel, still images, past, present and future and the aftermath of World War III. The tale of a man, a slave, sent back and forth, in and out of time, to find a solution to the world's fate, to replenish its decreasing stocks of food, medicine and energies, and in doing so, resulting in a perpetual memory of a lone female, life, death and past events that are recreated on an airport jetty.

sample.title: 7 Seconds
sample.plot: When an experienced thief accidentally makes off with a Van Gogh, his partner is kidnapped by gangsters in pursuit of the painting, forcing the criminal to hatch a rescue plan.

sample.title: Kidnapped
sample.plot: Jaime, his wife Marta and their teenage daughter Isa move to a dream house in Madrid and they plan a family dinner to celebrate. Out of the blue, three violent hooded thieves break in their house and hold the Marta and Isa hostage while their leader goes to the bank with Jaime to withdraw money from the family bank accounts in a tragic night of terror.

sample.title: 30 Monedas
sample.plot: A filmmaker watches his savings disappear on a failed project and loses his house. He is forced to move to a house he inherited, and promptly suffers a stroke. He is left wheelchair-bound, and his wife takes over the running of the household. They decide to sell his latest film to mysterious producers, and their house is suddenly besieged by paranormal activity.

categories.label: private homes turned into guarded fortresses
categories.description: Domestic space is treated as both refuge and trap, with family life sealed behind walls, locks, gates, and rules that outsiders cannot easily cross. What you'll see: villas with high fences, apartment corridors, intercoms, bolted doors, suburban dream houses, and kitchens or bedrooms made suddenly menacing.

categories.label: state power moving through police files
categories.description: Public authority works through investigators, prison vans, intelligence offices, permits, and official records that follow people even when the truth stays murky. What you'll see: detectives reopening old cases, questioning rooms, borderless bureaucratic interiors, escorts under guard, surveillance screens, and paper trails that carry great weight.

categories.label: television and news shaping public panic
categories.description: Events become spectacles as reporters, scandal, rumour, and mass attention turn private suffering into something watched and judged by strangers. What you'll see: camera crews, talk of headlines, public appeals, sensational coverage, reputations made or ruined, and crowds absorbing events through screens.

categories.label: young people sorted by school and postcode
categories.description: Childhood and youth unfold inside sharp social boundaries made by neighbourhood, class, school rank, and the need to belong to a circle. What you'll see: classrooms, holiday breaks, gang loyalties, awkward parties, road trips, playground codes, and the cruelties of being marked an outsider.

categories.label: old European villages holding stubborn beliefs
categories.description: In remote districts, local life still answers to inherited fears, churchgoing habits, seasonal customs, and stories that do not vanish before modern explanations. What you'll see: fogbound lanes, mountain or forest settlements, wary villagers, religious households, fairs and camps, and the sense that folklore still governs the night.

categories.label: scarcity making food and shelter precious
categories.description: When order thins out, the plain necessities of bread, warmth, medicine, and safe lodging become the first terms of power and survival. What you'll see: rationed meals, shabby apartment blocks, frozen landscapes, improvised exchange, exhausted bodies, and households calculating what can still be spared.

categories.label: machines quietly watching every movement
categories.description: Daily life is increasingly steered by systems that record, direct, and assess people, even when the watcher is only a voice in the background. What you'll see: guided vehicles, electronic oversight, disembodied instructions, monitored routes, coded access, and the unease of never acting unwitnessed.

categories.label: festivals and holy days framing the year
categories.description: The calendar still gathers people around Christmas, New Year, weddings, and annual rites, giving shared ceremony to lives that are otherwise fractured. What you'll see: decorated tables, stockings and gifts, family dinners, churchgoing, winter streets, wedding preparations, and ritual occasions overshadowed by dread or longing.

categories.label: criminal networks woven into ordinary streets
categories.description: Violence is not far from everyday life, because smugglers, thieves, hired killers, and local crews move through the same roads, bars, and estates as everyone else. What you'll see: nightclub doors, service stations, anonymous handoffs, street corners, cash withdrawals, hidden bosses, and respectable surfaces covering brutal trade.

categories.label: memory and reality refusing to stay settled
categories.description: The world is presented as unstable, with recollection, testimony, dreams, and repeated images carrying as much force as hard fact. What you'll see: uncertain flashbacks, stillness charged with meaning, disputed past events, eerie repetitions, and places that feel suspended outside ordinary time.
